hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */uv.lock|uv.lock) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not edit uv.lock directly. Use uv commands (uv add / uv remove / uv lock / uv sync) to change dependencies."}}';; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" || true;; esac
